name: Betty Ford
description: First Lady of the United States from 1974 to 1977
abstract: Elizabeth Anne Ford (née Bloomer; formerly Warren; April 8, 1918 – July 8, 2011) was First Lady of the United States from 1974 to 1977, as the wife of President Gerald Ford. As first lady, she was active in social policy, and set a precedent as a politically active presidential spouse.

about_quotes.speaker: Cliff Leeman
about_quotes.evidence: I have to add that Ella Fitzgerald was on that bill with us, and above the plaque that I just mentioned, there was a picture sent from President Ford, and was taken of he and his wife, Betty, with the Lawson-Haggard band
